en_title: Tom Hanks Uncertain About Toy Story 6 Return
cn_title: 汤姆·汉克斯不确定是否回归《玩具总动员6》
subtitle: 时间不可战胜
opus_summary: 汤姆·汉克斯称迪士尼或利用AI拼凑他过去的配音，让胡迪在《玩具总动员6》中继续出现。他强调续集必须有真正的新点子才值得拍，不能仅靠IP价值。虽然续集尚未公布，但《玩具总动员5》的票房大卖可能加速项目推进。

paragraphs.en: Disney could use technology to "cobble together" voice lines for Woody in Toy Story 6, Tom Hanks has suggested.
paragraphs.cn: 汤姆·汉克斯表示，迪士尼可能会使用技术为《玩具总动员6》中的胡迪「拼凑」配音。

paragraphs.en: Speaking to Entertainment Weekly , Hanks said that Disney "could put together anything they want" using technology or AI — meaning that his past performances as Woody the cowboy could be repurposed, and his character could still appear in new Toy Story films released long into the future.
paragraphs.cn: 汉克斯在接受《娱乐周刊》采访时表示，迪士尼可以利用技术或AI「随心所欲地组合出任何东西」——这意味着他过去饰演牛仔胡迪的表演可以被重新利用，他的角色未来仍能在很晚之后才推出的新《玩具总动员》电影中出现。

paragraphs.en: "Time is undefeated," Hank said, apparently referencing that he would not be around forever. "The question would be whether or not we could cobble together some version of me. Every word we have ever recorded in time in Toy Story is on digital media somewhere, so they could put together anything they would want."
paragraphs.cn: 汉克斯说：「时间是不可战胜的」，显然是在暗示他不会永远在世。「问题在于我们是否能拼凑出我的某个版本。我们为《玩具总动员》录制的每一个字都以数字形式存在于某个地方，所以他们可以随心所欲地组合任何东西。」

paragraphs.en: While Disney owns the rights to all of Hanks' past work as Woody, the idea that a future Toy Story film could be completed without Hanks himself recording new lines seems extremely unlikely. (It would also rather go against the message of Toy Story 5 , which suggests that technology should have some limits.)
paragraphs.cn: 虽然迪士尼拥有汉克斯过去为胡迪配音的所有权利，但未来的《玩具总动员》电影要在没有汉克斯亲自录制新台词的情况下完成，这似乎极不可能。（这也与《玩具总动员5》的寓意背道而驰，该片暗示技术应该有一定的界限。）

paragraphs.en: Additionally, while Toy Story 6 remains unannounced, this weekend's huge opening box office opening for Toy Story 5 means that any future (extremely lucrative) continuation of the hit Pixar franchise will likely happen sooner rather than later — and with the original cast where posstible.
paragraphs.cn: 此外，虽然《玩具总动员6》尚未公布，但本周末《玩具总动员5》的首映票房大卖，意味着这部大热的皮克斯系列未来（极其有利可图的）续集很可能会更早而非更晚发生——并且尽可能由原班人马出演。

paragraphs.en: Indeed, Hanks did not seem to discount the possibility of Toy Story 6 happening when asked, though insisted it needed a "great" idea to justify its existence.
paragraphs.cn: 事实上，当被问及《玩具总动员6》是否有可能时，汉克斯似乎并未排除这种可能性，不过他坚持认为它必须有一个「绝妙」的点子才能证明其存在的合理性。

paragraphs.en: "If you're gonna do another Toy Story, it better be worthwhile," Hanks said. "It better be great. You better be examining some theme that is not just dragging it out because people like the title. I mean, it is a huge corporate business without a doubt, I'm not gonna discount that. But unless it's good, new, fresh, there's no reason to do it at all."
paragraphs.cn: 「如果要再拍一部《玩具总动员》，那必须值得拍。」汉克斯说道，「必须很出色，必须探讨某种主题，而不能只是因为大家喜欢这个系列就硬往下拖。毫无疑问，这当然是个庞大的商业项目，我也不会否认这一点。但除非它够好、够新、够新鲜，否则根本没有拍的理由。」

paragraphs.en: When could Toy Story 6 arrive? The Toy Story series has traditionally taken lengthy gaps between launches, such as the 11-year wait for Toy Story 3, and the further nine years until Toy Story 4. This year's entry took a further seven years to materialize, meanwhile. Pixar is certainly busy, too, with a slate of original movies and sequels coming over the next half decade which also comprises fresh follow-ups to Coco and Monsters Inc. But after that? It seems likely we haven't seen the last of Woody and the gang just yet.
paragraphs.cn: 《玩具总动员6》可能会在何时上映？《玩具总动员》系列通常间隔很久才推出新作，比如《玩具总动员3》等了11年，《玩具总动员4》又过了9年。今年的这部新作则相隔了7年才面世。皮克斯自然也十分忙碌，未来五年内有一批原创电影和续集排期，其中还包括《寻梦环游记》和《怪兽电力公司》的新续作。但在此之后呢？看来我们很可能还没到和胡迪一伙告别的时候。

paragraphs.en: For more on the franchise's future, here's how Toy Story 5 could have ended — until its story was changed, and the film's finale was altered .
paragraphs.cn: 想了解更多关于该系列未来的信息，可以看看《玩具总动员5》原本可能的结局——直到故事和影片终幕都被修改。

paragraphs.en: Image source: Kevin Winter/GA/The Hollywood Reporter via Getty Images.
paragraphs.cn: 图片来源：Kevin Winter/GA/好莱坞报道者via Getty Images。
